apis.name: Assign Single Employee to Biometric Integration
apis.description: Assigns a single employee to a biometric integration via query configuration parameters.

apis.name: Assign Multiple Employees to Biometric Integration
apis.description: Assigns multiple employees to the selected biometric integration in one batch request using a JSON array of employee IDs.

apis.name: List All Biometric Employee Assignments
apis.description: Returns all biometric employee assignment records registered globally within the ecosystem database.

apis.name: Remove Single Employee from Biometric Integration
apis.description: Removes a unique biometric employee device configuration linkage map by its distinct assignment ID record context.

pathVariables.name: id
pathVariables.description: The unique assignment database primary key identifier

apis.name: Remove All Employees from a Biometric Integration
apis.description: Purges and removes all individual employee device configurations tied contextually to the target biometric integration template profile ID.

pathVariables.name: id
pathVariables.description: Target biometric integration ID context payload
